module.name: matmul
module.description: Matrix multiplication A × B = C, computed and drawn as three grids with one row of A, one column of B and the resulting cell highlighted.
module.aiSpec:
MATRIX MULTIPLICATION visualised: give A and B, it computes C = A×B and draws all three as grids, highlighting row i of A, column j of B and cell C[i][j] to show how one entry is formed. Use this to TEACH the row-by-column dot-product; for plain static matrices use @matrix-free math (KaTeX) instead. Block module body: split by <!-- @ --> into exactly two sections: • FIRST section = matrix A: one row per line, numbers separated by spaces or commas, • SECOND section = matrix B (A's number of columns must equal B's number of rows). Parameters: • row — which 1-based row of A to highlight (integer, default 1; 0 = disable highlighting). • col — which 1-based column of B to highlight (integer, default 1; 0 = disable). • color — highlight color (default var(--accent-color)). • decimals — max decimal places for displayed numbers (0-10, default 4; trailing zeros trimmed). • showwork — show the "c_ij = a·b + … = value" working line below (true/false, default true). • scale — overall size multiplier of the diagram (0.5-2.5, default 1). • op — the operator symbol drawn between A and B (× · or *, default ×).
<!-- @matmul row: 1, col: 2, decimals: 2 --> 1 2 3 4 <!-- @ --> 5 6 7 8 <!-- @end -->

param.name: row
param.label: Highlight row of A (0=off)
param.desc: 1-based row of A to highlight; 0 disables highlighting.

param.name: col
param.label: Highlight col of B (0=off)
param.desc: 1-based column of B to highlight; 0 disables highlighting.

param.name: color
param.label: Highlight color
param.desc: Color used to highlight the row, column and result cell.

param.name: decimals
param.label: Decimals
param.desc: Maximum decimal places shown in cells (trailing zeros are trimmed).

param.name: showwork
param.label: Show working line
param.desc: Show the dot-product working (c_ij = … = value) under the grids.

param.name: scale
param.label: Scale
param.desc: Overall size multiplier of the whole diagram.

param.name: op
param.label: Operator symbol
param.desc: Symbol drawn between matrix A and matrix B.

snippet.label: Matrix multiplication
snippet.description: A × B = C computed and drawn, one row/column/cell highlighted.
